summary: Frontend-only design overhaul testing complete. Landing page (/) and new /agents sub-page render correctly across desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x800). All required data-testids, sections, KPIs, brand strip, case-study cards, pipeline steps, neural-engine features, footer, navbar scrolled state, mobile hamburger, hero CTA -> SelectAgentModal flow, and /agents card -> AgentChatModal direct-open flow all verified. Dashboard ProtectedRoute correctly redirects unauthenticated users to landing. No blocking issues found.

issues: Console accessibility warnings: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' from radix Dialog used by SelectAgentModal / AgentChatModal. Non-blocking but should add a VisuallyHidden DialogTitle for a11y compliance.

action_items: (Low priority a11y) Add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle inside SelectAgentModal and AgentChatModal (Radix DialogContent requires a DialogTitle); currently logs console warnings only.

(Optional) The 401 'Failed to load resource' errors observed in console are from auth status API calls on the public landing — expected for unauthenticated visitors but could be silenced/handled gracefully.
critical_code_review_comments: Marketing.jsx and Agents.jsx duplicate the SelectAgentModal / AgentChatModal wiring + state (selectOpen/chatOpen/activeAgent) — consider extracting a useAgentSelection hook to DRY this up.
Agents.jsx defines a static `agents` array inline (4 items) — fine for now but if /dashboard or modal share agent metadata, consider moving to a shared module to avoid drift.
Imports unused: in Agents.jsx, `handleSelectAgent` is defined but only used by the SelectAgentModal (kept for fallback) — keep but ensure no orphan if SelectAgentModal is removed later.
CV components use Framer Motion whileInView — sections render correctly with scrolling; no performance issues observed but each section attaches its own observer — fine at this scale.
test_credentials: Not used — all tested flows are public. Optional dashboard cookie session_token=test_session_1779636592168 not needed; ProtectedRoute redirect verified instead.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing rebrand is solid. All cv-* data-testids in place: cv-navbar, cv-hero, cv-hero-cta-primary, cv-hero-floating-card, cv-section-engine, cv-section-pipeline, cv-section-results, cv-section-cta, cv-agent-card-{nova|sam|kai|angela}, cv-agents-dashboard-cta. Mobile hamburger toggles a menu with 5 links (System/Pipeline/Results/Agents/Pricing + Login). Clicking an agent card on /agents opens AgentChatModal directly with that agent preselected (verified Nova). Hero CTA opens SelectAgentModal correctly. Dashboard sidebar logo swap to cortex-logo.png is in DOM (4 cortex-logo images detected across nav). No backend changes — previous backend pytest files (test_scheduling_and_optimal.py, test_scheduler.py) were not re-run as instructed.
verified_flows: Landing renders without page errors (only 401s from auth/me-style calls + radix a11y console warnings)
Navbar scrolled state class applied after scroll > 14px (cv-glass-strong cv-glow-soft)
Hero badge 'AI-POWERED GROWTH SYSTEM', H1 'Turn Attention Into Digital Momentum.' present
Hero primary CTA opens SelectAgentModal with 4 agent cards
Neural Engine: OUR SYSTEM label, headline, Trend Detection, Audience Insights, Content Amplification, Smart Distribution all visible
Pipeline 5 steps: Strategy, Content, Distribution, Conversion, Scale all visible
Results 3 cards: GlowSkin/+312%, Liam Carter/+245K, Taskly/+182% all visible
Final CTA: 'Brand People Can't Ignore' headline visible
/agents H1 'Meet your always-on growth team.' renders; 4 agent cards present; clicking Nova opens AgentChatModal directly
Mobile (375x800): hamburger button present and toggles a menu showing all 5 nav links
/dashboard with no session redirects to / (ProtectedRoute working)
